language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings.

hours.title: How much time can you commit?
hours.subtitle: Per week — be honest, you can adjust later.

schedule.title: When do you learn best?
schedule.subtitle: We'll time your reminders to fit.

anchor.title: Tie it to a daily habit (optional)
anchor.subtitle: “After dinner” sticks better than “6pm” — pick the habit you'll study after.

done.title: You're all set!
done.subtitle: Welcome to DextaLearning — let's start learning.
done.with_picks: Welcome to DextaLearning — here are a few courses to get you started.

save_error: Couldn't save your preferences — you can update them later.

aside.learner_subtitle: A few quick questions so we can tailor courses, pace and reminders to you.
aside.instructor_subtitle: Set up your instructor profile so learners know who they're learning from.

whatsapp.title: Study reminders on WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Optional — add your number to get gentle nudges so you keep your streak.
whatsapp.optin: Send me study reminders on WhatsApp
whatsapp.optin_hint: You can turn this off anytime in settings.

instructor.welcome_subtitle: Here's what you can do in the Creator Studio:

points.create: Create courses, learning paths and live cohorts with video, audio, PDF and text lessons.
points.earn: Earn from your content with the Earn-Back model — learners are rewarded for finishing, you're paid for teaching.
points.publish: Publish whenever you're ready — no approval needed to start authoring.

instructor.profile_subtitle: This is your public presence on every course you teach. You can refine it later.
instructor.headline: Headline
instructor.bio_ph: Tell learners about your experience and what you teach…
instructor.ready_subtitle: Jump in and create your first course — it only takes a few minutes to get started.
instructor.payout_note: 💡 Set up your payout account later from Settings — you can publish and accrue earnings before then.
